name: blackbar
description: On-demand PII detection, anonymization, and reversible encryption with Microsoft Presidio.
long_description: Adds three tools to Claude Desktop: presidio_analyze (find PII in text), presidio_anonymize (replace, mask, hash, redact, or reversibly encrypt it), and presidio_decrypt (restore values that were encrypted, with the same key). A zero-dependency Node server talks to a local Presidio Analyzer over HTTP; detection runs entirely on your machine and encryption uses Node's built-in crypto, so the bundle needs no extra install or anonymizer service. Note: this is the on-demand half of blackbar; the automatic redaction hooks only exist in Claude Code.

tools.name: presidio_analyze
tools.description: Detect PII in text and return entity types, spans, and scores.

tools.name: presidio_anonymize
tools.description: Return a copy of the text with PII replaced, masked, hashed, redacted, or reversibly encrypted.

tools.name: presidio_decrypt
tools.description: Restore values previously encrypted by presidio_anonymize, using the same key.

analyzer_url.title: Presidio Analyzer URL
analyzer_url.description: Endpoint of your local Presidio Analyzer service.

default_operator.title: Default anonymization operator
default_operator.description: replace, redact, mask, hash, or encrypt.

language.title: Detection language
language.description: Language code such as en or es.
